holdings.infoBox: EDOG is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are Wipro stock at 5.53%, Infosys at 4.44%, Gedeon Richter at 3.75%, Bangkok Dusit Medical Services PCL at 3.29%, and Dr. Reddy's Laboratories at 3.12%.

overview.description: The ALPS Emerging Sector Dividend Dogs ETF (EDOG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index that selects five companies with the highest dividend yield in each of the ten GICS sectors excluding real estate. EDOG was launched on Mar 28, 2014 and is issued by SS&C.
